scripts.dev: dotenv -e .env -- concurrently -n server,client -c green,blue "npm run dev --workspace=apps/server" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/client"
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --wait db && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:setup: docker compose up -d --wait db && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run db:seed
